predictions.observable_consequence: There is a stable threat source that will continue shaping future danger. Observable consequence: favor hide or scan; protect memory of threat cues.
The danger was a local accident rather than a persistent source. Observable consequence: resume exploration sooner; verify recurrence before escalating.
Environmental interference or misleading conditions created the danger appearance. Observable consequence: verify environment before attributing stable threat; avoid overweighting one scene.
